title: erysimum pusillum subsp. cephalonicum
intro: Erysimum pusillum subsp. cephalonicum, also known as Cypriot wallflower, is a subspecies of the Erysimum pusillum plant, which belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erysimum pusillum subsp. cephalonicum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and infections. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
